methods.name: lbkit.component.build.BuildComponent.get_package_version
documentation:
从CMakeLists.txt读取版本号，格式需要满足正则表达式：project\((.*)VERSION ([0-9][1-9]*.[0-9][1-9]*.[0-9][1-9]*)\)
示例: project(gcom LANGUAGES C VERSION 0.1.0)

classes.name: lbkit.cli.Command

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.help
documentation: Shows help for a specific command.

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.gen
documentation:
代码自动生成.

支持自动生成服务端和客户端C代码

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.new
documentation:
按LiteBmc最佳实践创建一个新的组件.

你需要指定你需要使用的编程语言，当前仅支持C(基于litebmc框架)和C++(基于openbmc的sdbusplus)

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.build
documentation:
构建组件.

    组件需要支持多种跨平台构建场景，典型的包括DT（X86-64）、交叉编译（arm64）

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.create
documentation:
构建组件.

    组件需要支持多种跨平台构建场景，典型的包括DT（X86-64）、交叉编译（arm64）

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.gitee
documentation:
Call gitee api.

    CI场景调用gitee的API完成像标签、评论等基本操作

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.test
documentation:
构建DT.

组件DT用例执行

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command._show_help
documentation: Prints a summary of all commands.

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command._commands
documentation: Returns a list of available commands.

methods.name: lbkit.cli.Command.run
documentation:
HIDDEN: entry point for executing commands, dispatcher to class
methods

A single command of the lbkit application, with all the first level commands. Manages the
parsing of parameters and delegates functionality in collaborators. It can also show the
help of the tool.
